basic_details.job_title: ARI Pune Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: ARI Pune is recruiting 1 Project Associate I post with Master’s qualification, last date 20 July 2026.

important_dates.display of shortlist: To be informed via email / Institute website

application_fee.details: Rs. 100/- (Non-refundable) for General/OBC candidates Exempted for SC/ST/Divyang/Women candidates Payment to be made online via SBI Collect

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 Years as on closing date of advertisement (Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC etc. as per GoI norms)
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Agricultural Science / Life Sciences from a recognized University/College

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 1 Project Title: "Exploring fungal symbiont metabolites as biocontrol agents against muscardine disease in mulberry silkworms (Bombyx mori) in Maharashtra" (RGSTC-SP-388) Post Code: RGSTC-07-2026-27-PA

selection_process: Candidates will be shortlisted based on qualifications and experience. Shortlisted candidates will be called for Online Interview. Final selection is based on performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be provided for the interview. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment.
how_to_apply: Visit the online application link: http://arijob.ourlib.in
Attach self-attested scanned copies of certificates, passport size photograph, caste certificate (if applicable), and application fee receipt.
Submit the application on or before 20 July 2026.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and contractual. Candidates must fulfill the minimum essential qualifications. The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates for interview. Desirable qualifications may be relaxed for exceptionally meritorious candidates. Candidates can appear for interview in Hindi as well.

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ARI Pune is recruiting 1 Project Associate I post with Master’s qualification, last date 20 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

rows.date: To be informed via email / Institute website

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total Posts: 1 Project Title: "Exploring fungal symbiont metabolites as biocontrol agents against muscardine disease in mulberry silkworms (Bombyx mori) in Maharashtra" (RGSTC-SP-388) Post Code: RGSTC-07-2026-27-PA

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Master’s Degree in Agricultural Science / Life Sciences from a recognized University/College
1st Class M.Sc. in Agricultural Sciences / Life Sciences; Experience in fungal culturing & handling, laboratories, and silkworm rearing unit
35 Years as on closing date of advertisement (Relaxation for SC/ST/OBC etc. as per GoI norms)

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Rs. 100/- (Non-refundable) for General/OBC candidates Exempted for SC/ST/Divyang/Women candidates Payment to be made online via SBI Collect

content_sections.heading: ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates will be shortlisted based on qualifications and experience. Shortlisted candidates will be called for Online Interview. Final selection is based on performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be provided for the interview. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the online application link: http://arijob.ourlib.in Fill the online application form. Attach self-attested scanned copies of certificates, passport size photograph, caste certificate (if applicable), and application fee receipt. Submit the application on or before 20 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and contractual. Candidates must fulfill the minimum essential qualifications. The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates for interview. Desirable qualifications may be relaxed for exceptionally meritorious candidates. Candidates can appear for interview in Hindi as well.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ARI Pune Project Associate I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for Project Associate I at Agharkar Research Institute?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend is Rs. 20,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for ARI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Master’s Degree in Agricultural Science or Life Sciences. 1st Class M.Sc. and experience in fungal culturing/silkworm rearing is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are there in ARI Pune Project Associate I 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Project Associate I position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for ARI SP-388 Recruitment?
faq.answer: “Exploring fungal symbiont metabolites as biocontrol agents against muscardine disease in mulberry silkworms (Bombyx mori) in Maharashtra”.

faq.question: Q6. When is the online interview for ARI Project Associate I?
faq.answer: The online interview is scheduled for 27 July 2026 at 10:30 AM onwards.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ARI Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, Rs. 100/- (exempted for SC/ST/Divyang/Women candidates).

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for Agharkar Research Institute Project Associate I?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the closing date (with relaxation for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Project Associate I position located?
faq.answer: The position is in the Biodiversity and Palaeobiology (Fungi) Group at Agharkar Research Institute, Pune.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates appear for the interview in Hindi?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates have the option to appear for the interview in Hindi language as well.
